caption: A man is seen inside a vehicle, positioned in the driver's seat and facing toward the right. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light-colored, short-sleeved collared shirt. The initial scene begins in darkness before transitioning to a profile shot of the man. Outside the vehicle windows, a flat, open landscape with green and brown terrain is visible under a bright sky. The man's arm is extended toward the steering wheel, and a side-view mirror is visible through the window. As the sequence progresses, the camera remains in a steady profile view of the man as he appears to be speaking. In the final moments, white on-screen text appears at the bottom of the frame, stating, "I'm Hamdi Shadah Saleem El Dajah".
